training_status: actively exercising, calorie counting, meal prepping

benefits.description: Lost 91 lbs on tirzepatide over 18 weeks (397 lbs to 306 lbs); total transformation from starting weight of 553 lbs down to 307 lbs
Able to resist late-night eating and manage hunger with the help of tirzepatide
Used BPC-157/TB-500 blend previously for recovery from ruptured bicep tendon

protocol_notes: Started with a medical weight loss clinic program for 16 weeks, then transitioned to self-sourcing tirzepatide from a biotech vendor. Had previously lost weight from 556 to 360 lbs through diet and exercise alone before regaining 30 lbs. Started tirzepatide in December 2023. Height: 6'3".
